query:
SELECT u.id as user_id, u.email, u.name, u.tenantId, t.id as tenant_id, t.name as tenant_name 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN tenants t ON u.tenantId = t.id 
WHERE u.email = 'coreydenzel14@gmail.com';
command:
